---
name: Review Submission (automated)
about: Template used by Comet Collector to submit review results
labels: review-submission
---

**DO NOT FILL THIS TEMPLATE MANUALLY.** Reviews are created automatically by Comet Collector Shortcut.

If you need to submit a manual review, use this format:

```
---REVIEW-SUBMISSION-START---
Reviewer: <your name or model>
Date: <ISO 8601>
Product: <product slug>
Version: v<version>
Verdict: <SHIPS | SHIPS WITH PATCHES | REDO>

[Review content here — sections A-K]

---REVIEW-SUBMISSION-END---
```
